title: Faulks & Cox Tubtrug Flexible 14L Small, Pink SP14PK
features: • Can be used to store practically anything
• Non toxic, food grade, child and animal friendly
description: Product Description The Tubtrugs Flexible tubs can be used to store practically anything. They are manufactured from a low density polyethylene and are non-toxic, food grade and child and animal safe. These tubs are flexible yet very strong and have the added bonus of being frost and UV resistant. They are available in a range of colours and sizes. This small Tubtrugs tub has the following specifications: Capacity: 14 Litres. Dimensions: Height: 23cm. Diameter: 33cm. Colour: Pink. Common uses: Horse feed, plant pot, toy storage, general household storage, laundry basket etc. Useful for everyone, the great thing about Gorilla products is that everyone finds them useful. Electricians, plumbers, plasterers, carpenters - the list is endless. Gorilla have a fabulous range of flexible containers which are by-words for quality and style. International brands, Tubtrugs, Gorilla Tubs, Multi-tubs Products. Gorilla offer product assurance and great value for money across many market sectors. There's simply nothing tougher than a Gorilla Tub! The minute you pick one up you know you're holding a quality tool in your hands. Gorilla Tubs are strong enough for any builder to put it through its paces and still perform day after day. So throw away your old builders bucket, invest in a set of Gorilla Tubs and see how they really are! Box Contains 1 x Tubtrug Tub
